title: Ventra Modpack
description: A performance enhancing modpack with major optimizations targeting vanilla Minecraft paper servers. Specifically for the Ventra private server.
body:
# Ventra Modpack – Highly Optimized Client-Side Mods for Vanilla Paper Minecraft Servers

The **Ventra Modpack** is a carefully curated collection of client-side mods designed to enhance performance and visual quality while playing on vanilla-based Minecraft servers. This modpack integrates Sodium, Iris, and various other performance-enhancing and visual improvement mods to provide a smooth and optimized experience when connecting to vanilla servers.

## Who Is This Modpack For?

While the primary target of this modpack is players on the Private Ventra server, it can also be used by anyone looking to improve their single-player performance or enhance their experience when playing on other servers.

## Why Use This Modpack?

- Lightweight & Efficient – We aim to keep the number of mods manageable to reduce dependency issues and ensure quick updates when new Minecraft versions are released.
- Version Consistency – By bundling and managing mod versions within the modpack, we minimize compatibility issues and prevent users from running into problems caused by mismatched mod versions.
- Performance & Quality-of-Life Enhancements – Every mod included is focused on improving FPS, reducing lag, and enhancing the overall visual and gameplay experience without breaking vanilla compatibility.

## Versioning System

Each version of the Ventra Modpack follows a structured numbering system:

    1.x.x → Major updates tied to full Minecraft version changes (e.g., 1.20 → 1.21).
    x.1.x → Updates for sub-versions of Minecraft (e.g., 1.21 → 1.21.1).
    x.x.1 → Minor mod updates and fixes between major releases.
